titleStmt.title: SII 27.413: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 413. (A.R. No. 336 of 1930-31.) SUJĒRU, MANGALORE TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying about two furlongs from Bhūtasthāna temple.
This record is dated Śaka 1450 Saravadhāri Viśākha ba. 2, Tuesday corresponding to 1528 A.D., May 5, Tuesday, f.d.t. ·34.

It registers an agreement defining the rights and privileges of Tuḷuvarasa alias Chauṭa of Puttige and the Aḷi-sāvira and Baḷi-sāvira on one side, and Vira-Narasiṁha Baṅga and his 5000 followers on the others. The agreement was arrived at through the arbitration of Vēdānanda-voḍeya, disciple of Kṛisṇānanda-voḍeya and in the presence of Tirumalarasa alias Kinnika-heggaḍe.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁga śirastuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē trayilōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁ
bhāya śaṁbhavē svastiśrī jayādbhudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣa 1450 ne varttamāna vyavahā
rika sarvvadhāri saṁvatsarada vayiśākha ba 2 maṁ lu śrīmatuputtigeyalu bāḷuva tuḷuvarasa
rāda cauṭaru Aḷisāvira baḷisāviradavaru baṁgavāḍiyali bāḷuva vīranarasiṁha baṁgarigū mūḍa
paḍuvaṇa Ayidusāvira Āḷigū kruṣṇānaṁdavoḍeyaru Avara śiṣya vēdānaṁda voḍeyara
madhyastadiṁda tirumalarasarāda kaṁnika heggaḍeyara barasikoṭṭa muṁdiṭṭu śilāśāsanada
kramaveṁteṁdare tubarahādiyalu nīu niṁ mūḍa paḍavaṇa Ayidu sāviraĀḷu pakhkhadikkina
varu sahitavāgi mūḍaṇiṁda paḍuvadāṁṭuvāga paḍuvaṇiṁda mūḍadāṭuvāga nāutubara
lu hāḍiyakaṭṭi taḷupeU nīu Aṁmeṁbaḷadalu kāḷagavanu kādasalladu bēḍakōṭegāṟaranu taka
lāgadu nāu baḷināḍu mūṟuneladiṁda maṁdiyanu tāreU kopparigeya staḷayinavaḷi dēvaradē
vasva siṁgērivoḍeyara saṁkēta Āstaḷau pūrvvavarttaka pūrvva mariyodeyalli yiruha Ā saṁ
kētavaṁnu nāu AḷiyeU nīu Aḷiya salladu naṁma Aḷisāvira baḷisāviradavaranu pakhadikki
navaranu koḍi koṁḍu teṁkabaḍagahōge nīu hādiya kaṭṭi taḷupa salladu keravaneya
vara maṁdi kudureya taṁdu nāu niṁma keḍiseU nīu Avarabage Āḷu kudureya
taṁdu naṁmanu keḍisalāgadu naṁma pakṣada ballāḷugaḷa nīu hiḍiyasalladu niṁma
pakṣada ballāḷugaḷa nāu hiḍiyeU �yo vakhkhaṇege tappau nīu tappalāgadu nāu nī
U tappidare puttige baṁgavāḍiya sōmanāthadēvarugaḷige tappidavaru vāraṇāsiya
li nūṟumaṁdi yatīśvarara koṁda pāpake hōheU Eḷughaṭṭadali yiḷida kavileya
koṁdaṁthā pāpake hōheU mahattāda kuṁbhīpāka narakakke hoheU maṁdu bara
sidaṁthā śilaśāsanakke maṁgaḷamahā śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī
haṁtti 19 kaṁ Ācaṁdrārkasthāyiyāgi
Digital edition of SII 27.413 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
